summary: Completed testing of Shopping List stock_level feature and Gap Analysis sidebar. All features working correctly - shopping list displays stock level badges (Empty, Low) instead of quantities, Gap Analysis sidebar works on desktop, and mobile collapsible card works on Planner page.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/shopping saves stock_level field correctly
Backend: Shopping item with stock_level='low' created correctly
Backend: Shopping item with stock_level='empty' created correctly
Backend: Shopping item without stock_level defaults to None
Backend: Gap analysis response has correct structure (ingredient, meal, date)
Frontend: Shopping page displays stock level badges (○ Empty, ◔ Low)
Frontend: Sync from Inventory button adds items with correct stock_level
Frontend: Gap Analysis sidebar visible on desktop (right sidebar)
Frontend: Gap Analysis mobile card visible on mobile viewport
Frontend: Gap Analysis mobile card expands/collapses on click
Frontend: Gap Analysis shows missing ingredients grouped by date
Frontend: Add to Shopping List button visible in Gap Analysis
critical_code_review_comments: ShoppingItem model correctly includes stock_level field (line 71-82 in server.py)
create_shopping_item endpoint properly saves stock_level (line 950-977 in server.py)
ShoppingPage.js correctly displays stock_level badge with proper styling (line 282-292)
GapAnalysisSidebar.js properly implements mobile-friendly collapsible design
PlannerPage.js correctly includes mobile gap analysis card (line 182-184)
seed_data_creation: Test items created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shopping list stock_level feature fully tested. Backend saves and returns stock_level field correctly. Frontend displays ○ Empty and ◔ Low badges instead of quantities. Gap Analysis sidebar works on desktop (right sidebar) and mobile (collapsible card on Planner page). Sync from Inventory button correctly adds items with their stock_level from inventory.

mocked_apis.Translation API: /api/translate uses static dictionary instead of Google Translate API
